examples: The dark green spare bedroom is in total contrast to the lightness of the large main bedroom.
I accept, with a tiny shiver of excitement, a lightness I haven't felt much recently.
The profundity of this book is achieved with breathtaking lightness.
This lightness began to buoy me and urge me, unfettered, along the highways of southwestern France.
The heaviness of being successful was replaced by the lightness of being a beginner again.
